drl:
rule "R0"
salience 2
agenda-group "ga"
when
    exists(T3($g0_0 : f0) and T2(f0 >= $g0_0))
then
end
rule "R1"
no-loop
agenda-group "ga"
when
    ( T2(f0 >= 2.5, f0 <= -1.5, $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f0) and T0(f0 == false, f0 == true, $b1_1_0 : f0) and T3($b1_2_0 : f0) )
    or
    ( T2(f0 >= 2.5, f0 != 5.5, $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f0) and T0(f0 == false, f0 != true, $b1_1_0 : f0) and T3($b1_2_0 : f0) )
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    accumulate( T2(f0 in (-3.0, 6, 0.5), f0 not in (-1.0, 3.5), f0 in (11, 5.5, 1.5) || f0 >= 3.0, $s2_0 : f0); $a2_0 : average($s2_0) )
    T3(f0 not in (5, -1000000007, 2), f0 not in (9), f0 == $a2_0)
then
end
rule "R3"
salience 6
no-loop
when
    $p3_0 : T0(f0 != true, f0 == false, $b3_0_0 : f0, f0 == false)
    accumulate( T3(f0 < 8, $s3_1 : f0); $a3_1 : average($s3_1) )
    T2($b3_2_0 : f0, $b3_2_1 : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
    modify($p3_0) { setF0(true) }
end
